creator: jgh@FreeBSD.org
text:
I am already working on this, and plan on committing it very soon, myself. -jgh -- Jason Helfman | FreeBSD Committer jgh@FreeBSD.org | http://people.freebsd.org/~jgh | The Power to Serve On Sun, Jan 6, 2013 at 7:40 PM, Marcelo Araujo wrote: > The following reply was made to PR ports/174961; it has been noted by > GNATS. > > From: Marcelo Araujo > To: Eric Krausser > Cc: bug-followup@freebsd.org, nemysis > Subject: Re: ports/174961: graphics/xsane fails to compile > Date: Mon, 7 Jan 2013 11:36:05 +0800 > > --e89a8f3ba77174809804d2aa872b > Content-Type: text/plain; charset=ISO-8859-1 > > 2013/1/5 Eric Krausser > > > graphics/xsane fails to compile, because `sane-config --libs` (from > > graphics/sane-backends) can not find > > /usr/local/libdata/pkgconfig/sane-backends.pc > > > > To solve this problem apply the attached patch against > > /usr/ports/graphics/sane-backends/Makefile, please. > > > > > Dear Eric, > > Thank you so much for the patch. > I'm gonna make some tests and soon as possible I'm gonna commit it. > > > Best Regards, > > > > -- > Marcelo Araujo > araujo@FreeBSD.org > > --e89a8f3ba77174809804d2aa872b > Content-Type: text/html; charset=ISO-8859-1 > Content-Transfer-Encoding: quoted-printable > >

2013/1/5 Eric Krausser dir=3D"ltr"= > >< target=3D"_blank">eric@krausse= > r-edv.de>
style=3D"margi= > n:0 0 0 .8ex;border-left:1px #ccc solid;padding-left:1ex"> > graphics/xsane fails to compile, because `sane-config --libs` (from
> graphics/sane-backends) can not find
> /usr/local/libdata/pkgconfig/sane-backends.pc
>
> To solve this problem apply the attached patch against
> /usr/ports/graphics/sane-backends/Makefile, please.
class=3D"HOEnZ= > b"> color=3D"#888888">

iv>Dear Eric,

Thank you so much for the > patch. v> >
I'm gonna make some tests and soon as possible I'm gonna > commi= > t it.


Best > Regards,=A0
